summary: Tested God Mode persistence after browser refresh and feed privacy enforcement. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 errors in console - endpoint may not exist or wrong path

context_for_next_testing_agent: God Mode persistence and feed privacy enforcement verified working. Test user testuser_e1@test.com is an admin.

god_mode_persistence_after_refresh.notes: localStorage values (isGodMode, activePersona, isPersonaBarActive) all persist after page refresh. Verified: isGodMode='true', activePersona='Pro', isPersonaBarActive='true' all retained after reload.

god_mode_persona_selection_shows_role_sp.notes: When Pro Surfer persona selected, sidebar shows role-specific features: 'The Peak' and 'Stoked' (Pro-only features). Persona bar shows 'VIEWING AS: PRO SURFER' with star icon. Sidebar shows 'Testing as Pro Surfer (God Mode - Actual: Surfer)'.

feed_privacy_enforcement_backend.notes: Backend posts.py correctly implements privacy filtering. Posts from private accounts are filtered unless viewer is author or accepted friend. 7/7 backend tests passed.

feed_privacy_api_structure.notes: Feed endpoint accepts user_id parameter for privacy filtering. Profile has is_private field. Privacy toggle works correctly.

god_mode_ui_elements.persona_bar: Yellow banner at top showing 'VIEWING AS: PRO SURFER' with dropdown to change persona
god_mode_ui_elements.sidebar_indicator: Shows 'Testing as Pro Surfer' with '(God Mode - Actual: Surfer)' in red text
god_mode_ui_elements.admin_console: Admin Console link visible in sidebar (orange/red color)
god_mode_ui_elements.role_specific_features: Pro Surfer persona shows 'The Peak' and 'Stoked' menu items in sidebar

persona_tab.active_indicator: Selected persona shows 'ACTIVE' badge with checkmark
